content: Local/offline LLM log analysis landscape: mostly thin prototypes — Ollama+Llama3 scripts, llm-rca-assistant (local RAG RCA prototype), stratosphereips/llm-log-analyzer (single python file, prompt over log text), Streamlit-based analyzers. Drivers: regulated industries (GDPR/HIPAA/SOC2), air-gapped environments, zero API cost. Limitations of existing tools: no structured event schema, no dedup/clustering at scale, no citation/grounding mechanism, no evaluation, no packaging — a genuine gap for a production-grade local triage CLI.
